option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location "F:\projects\vocalchat"; if (-not (Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Error "Docker CLI not found. Please install Docker Desktop."; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path Env:\DOCKER_INSECURE_NO_IPTABLES_RAW) { Remove-Item Env:\DOCKER_INSECURE_NO_IPTABLES_RAW }; $env:DOCKER_BUILDKIT='0'; $env:COMPOSE_DOCKER_CLI_BUILD='0'; cmd /c "docker info >nul 2>nul"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error "Docker Desktop engine is not running. Start Docker Desktop and retry."; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path ".env")) { Copy-Item ".env.example" ".env" -Force }; cmd /c "docker compose build --pull=false"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmd /c "docker compose up -d"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmd /c "docker compose ps"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmd /c "docker compose logs -f app"
